type: SURVEY
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
note: Adding error_threshold param to Image.quantize() method (signature + docstring + body: after computing palette, compute MSE between original and quantized image, retry with more colors or fall back to max colors if threshold not met). Need to know what construct(s) you're touching in quantize() or Image.py to avoid clobbering.

type: SURVEY
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
note: Adding sort_palette param to Image.quantize() (signature + docstring + post-quantize sorting logic at end of method body, after palette is built). Need to know if you also touch quantize().
